message:
fix(readme): use master branch in install URL

The Quick Install curl command referenced the non-existent 'main' branch,
causing a 404 error. The repository uses 'master' as its default branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@

Quick Install

```bash -curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper/main/install.sh?$(date +%s)" | bash -s -- --easy-mode +curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper/master/install.sh?$(date +%s)" | bash -s -- --easy-mode ```

Installs rch + rchd, configures the hook, and can optionally enable the background daemon. If rchd or workers are unavailable, RCH fails open to local builds.
